'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 104''' is the one hundred fourth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[February 20]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[The Weapons Master!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[The Weapons Master!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 14: 'Puter!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Beware of the ... robots!"
*Star Profile: [[Harrison Ford]]
